channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Unprecedented Observation Reveals 2 Supermassive Black Holes Locked in a Tight Death Spiral
item.description: New research describes an unexpected double jet in a distant galaxy, revealing a pair of supermassive black holes on the verge of colliding.

item.title: I don't care about the iPhone Fold — the biggest moment in iPhone history just happened in space
item.description: The Artemis II crew used an iPhone, and suddenly, nothing is more important about Apple's iconic product, not even the possibility of a foldable device.

item.title: Floating data centers cruise a bit closer after a major show of support from Japanese giant Hitachi
item.description: Japan is advancing floating data center plans using converted ships, with Hitachi support, to address land shortages and growing AI infrastructure demand.

item.title: Anthropic Launches ‘Project Glasswing’ to Stealthily Spot Cybersecurity Issues for Rivals
item.description: The company previously warned that its newest model "presents unprecedented cybersecurity risks."

item.title: Tiny Robots Reveal Hidden Ocean Chemistry in Low-Oxygen Waters
item.description: A trove of robotic floats is bringing our knowledge of the deep sea to new depths.

item.title: Iran-Linked Hackers Are Sabotaging US Energy and Water Infrastructure
item.description: As Trump threatens Iranian infrastructure, the US government warns that Iran has carried out its own digital attacks against US critical infrastructure.

item.title: Spotify’s Prompted Playlists can help you find new podcasts to listen to
item.description: On Tuesday, Spotify expanded its Prompted Playlists feature to include podcasts, an update that could make it easier for Premium users to find new shows to listen to. Prompted Playlists were originally launched as a beta feature in December, but previously only worked for music. You can use the feature to effectively generate customized Discover […]...

item.title: Aunt Lydia Survived ‘The Handmaid’s Tale’ to Bring New Complexity to ‘The Testaments’
item.description: She's no longer framed as a villain—but what's her role in the sequel series? Emmy-winning actor Ann Dowd explains.

item.title: Iranian hackers are targeting American critical infrastructure, US agencies warn
item.description: A joint FBI, NSA, and CISA advisory warns that Iranian hackers have "escalated" their tactics in response to the ongoing U.S.-Israel war with Iran.

item.title: Scientists Think They’ve Finally Discovered Why Your Cat Never Finishes Its Meal
item.description: Turns out there might be a very understandable reason why your cat leaves its bowl half-empty.

item.title: Social media panic reaches new apocalyptic fervor as Trump calls to ‘destroy a whole civilization’ over Iran war
item.description: Amid a stock market frenzy and spiking oil prices, X users are calling on Congress to ‘do something.’ President Donald Trump’s threats to destroy “a whole civilization”—if Iran does not meet tonight’s deadline to reach the end of the war—is being met with alarm triggering a market frenzy, and oil prices to spike, and response across social media about what Congress should do, including invoking the 25th amendment to remove Trump from office. ...

item.title: 5 Things We Noticed During NASA’s Historic Lunar Flyby
item.description: The Artemis 2 astronauts flew around the far side of the Moon yesterday, smashing the record for the farthest distance humans have ever traveled from Earth. Here are some interesting details you may have missed during the flyby.

item.title: Apple's foldable iPhone is reportedly at risk of delay
item.description: Apple has run into "more issues than expected" with its foldable iPhone that may set back its release, according to Nikkei. The engineering problems reportedly cropped up during the device's early test production phase and may delay first shipments by months, according to multiple sources briefed on the matter. However, a separate report in Bloomberg refutes the gist of Nikkei's claims. "The current situation could put the mass production timeline at risk," one of Nikkei's sources said. "April will mark a crucial stage of the engineering verification test, and this month till early may is ext...

item.title: Trump’s War on American Cybersecurity Ramps Up With Planned $700 Million Cuts to CISA
item.description: The administration also wants to axe programs countering misinformation and propaganda.

item.title: Our top-rated running shoes and watches are on sale at Amazon — save up to 45% from Nike, Garmin, Apple, and more
item.description: It's officially marathon season, and if you're looking for new gear, I've rounded up our top-rated running shoes and smartwatches that are currently on sale at Amazon.

item.title: 'AI is only as strong as its data': Why Microsoft is betting on this little-known startup’s 700B parameter model to predict your next purchase
item.description: Microsoft and Yobi partner to deploy a 700 billion parameter AI model that predicts consumer intent using consented behavioral data across platforms.

item.title: You can now turn 2D apps into 3D while using the Galaxy XR headset
item.description: Android XR is getting a new feature that turns 2D apps, websites, images, and videos into "3D experiences." The feature, which Google calls "auto-spatialization," was initially announced last year, and it's launching on Tuesday as an experimental feature for Samsung Galaxy XR headsets. Here's a video from Google that gives you an idea about how […]

item.title: I wish this selfie phone case was better for selfies
item.description: The Selfix phone case is a classic example of a great idea in theory that falls apart in practice. It's a case for the iPhone 17 Pro with a circular screen on the back. It mirrors the middle of your main phone screen, making it easier to frame up selfies using your phone's higher-quality rear […]

item.title: Sony will scan players and put their faces in PS5 games
item.description: The PS5 is more expensive than ever, but at least you can have your likeness put into PS5 games now.

item.title: 10 Years Ago Today, ‘Star Wars’ Changed Its Future With the First Look at ‘Rogue One’
item.description: Celebrate the anniversary of the unforgettable first trailer for 'Rogue One: A Star Wars Story.'

item.title: Forget white-collar jobs. AI is also displacing workers without college degrees
item.description: A new report reveals how AI will fracture the career pathways that workers without college degrees have long relied on for upward mobility. White-collar workers have been at the center of much of the public handwringing over AI. Entry-level jobs in finance and software engineering seem to be on the chopping block. More college graduates are struggling to find work in a challenging job market, and unemployment ticked up to 5.6% by the end of 2025. Tech companies and other major employers have repeatedly cited AI adoption to justify layoffs. ...

item.title: How to watch PSG vs. Liverpool online for free
item.description: How to watch Champions League for free. Live stream PSG vs. Liverpool in the Champions League for free.

item.title: How to watch Barcelona vs. Atletico Madrid online for free
item.description: How to watch the Champions League for free. Watch Barcelona vs. Atletico Madrid in the Champions League for free from anywhere in the world.
